````text
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>Used projects parts, chosen for decomposition, should be cohesive, logically complete and have relatively few external dependencies. Circular dependencies between used projects are discouraged. In general, the same criteria should be used for decomposing model into smalled projects as are used by software architects to decompose software into libraries.</text>
````

### ENTRY: BINARY-2893144f-1620-4f5a-ad6f-7b676d929392

- bytes: 388978
- crc32: `e9841c12`
- decoded_as: `utf-8`

````text
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>

<mdOwnedViews>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392615_157119_1381'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 952, 616, 56</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:18pt;&quot;&gt;Recovered Elements Management&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392615_674480_1382'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 49, 242, 22</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;font style=&quot;font-size:18pt;&quot;&gt;Listing Recovered Elements&lt;/font&gt;&lt;/b&gt;
  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392615_211303_1383'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 294, 574, 49</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
There is also a summary of validation errors represented in the application task bar.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Clicking that summary opens the &lt;b&gt;Active Validation Results&lt;/b&gt; pane:

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392615_379997_1384'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 91, 847, 21</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
When a project containing recovered elements is opened, the &lt;b&gt;Recovered Elements Detected &lt;/b&gt;notification is displayed in the project.&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392616_438162_1385'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 805, 766, 140</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
Explanation of recovered elements validation errors:

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;b&gt;REF&lt;/b&gt;: The element is a recovered element. This element is referenced by another element in the project. These elements are also listed by other errors - SRE or URE.

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;b&gt;SRE&lt;/b&gt;: The recovered element is displayed on a diagram. Diagrams may have more than one recovered element displayed as a symbol. Each symbol of a recovered element is listed as a SRE error. An example of this error is the recovered element List represented on a diagram.

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;b&gt;URE&lt;/b&gt;: The element has a meta-property reference to a recovered element. An example of this error is an attribute Collection typed by List that has become a recovered element.

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392616_194215_1386'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 987, 868, 260</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
Recovered elements indicate that there are unresolved references in your project.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
An unresolved reference means that your project contains an element that refers to some used project element that has become inaccessible because it is no longer shared, it was removed, it was moved to a non-shared location, etc.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
To maintain your model integrity and project composition when the element is inaccessible, the modeling tool recovers the inaccessible elements. This allows maintaining references that are indicated as unresolved in&amp;#160;your project.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
It is highly recommended that you eliminate recovered elements from your model. This can be done in one of the following ways:&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
By eliminating the causes of the element recovery. This is the case when recovered elements still exist. Identify the cause of the element recovery and eliminate it by, for example, sharing the package that contains the recovered element, moving the element back from a non-shared location to the shared one, etc.

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
By restoring recovered elements. This is the case when recovered elements no longer exist but can be restored from the bits of information the modeling tool still has. The restored element has only ID, name, and type.

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
By managing the unresolved references that refer to the appropriate recovered elements. This is the case when recovered elements no longer exist and cannot be restored.

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392617_155149_1387'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 1295, 868, 110</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
To learn how to avoid triggering element recovery in your project, follow these recommendations:

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Avoid unexpected modifications of shared elements (for example, removing a shared element, moving the element to a non-shared location, etc.).

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Configure the modeling tool so that it prompts your confirmation to perform a potentially dangerous action&lt;span style=&quot;color:#ff0099;&quot;&gt; &lt;/span&gt;(for example, attempting to stop sharing a package, removing the content of a shared package, or moving elements from one used project to another when both projects are used in the read-write mode).

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Select the relevant level of model integrity and project composition inspection.

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392617_800207_1388'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 1253, 366, 44</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:18pt;&quot;&gt;How to avoid triggering element recovery&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;&lt;span style=&quot;font-size:18pt;&quot;&gt;&amp;#160;&lt;/span&gt;&lt;/b&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='ImageShape' xmi:id='_20_0_415017e_1598542392617_879461_1389'>

		</properties>
````

````text
		<text>Undesirable dependency - an item from the used project depends on items from the main project (Note that the main project already depends on the used project - this situation creates cyclic dependencies).

To find these dependencies - 
Run a command from main menu:
Analyze-&gt; Dependency Checker (Choose the &quot;Error&quot; filter level to list only undesirable dependencies)</text>
````

### ENTRY: BINARY-0d1f1467-421c-44aa-a2ac-aaf87489b746

- bytes: 23105
- crc32: `205e0602`
- decoded_as: `utf-8`

````text
<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?>

<mdOwnedViews>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_11_5EAPbeta_f720368_1150786673917_658721_974'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 98, 674, 290</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
This sample describes &lt;b&gt;model decomposition&lt;/b&gt; functionality introduced in MagicDraw v11.5. Two new features were added:      
&lt;br&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Editable (read-write) project usages&lt;/b&gt;. This feature allows editing used project contents in-place, as if they were in the main project. &amp;quot;Code Level&amp;quot; project is mounted as read-write and illustrates this feature.

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Unloadable/notloadable project usages&lt;/b&gt;. This feature is useful in many ways. The main use case is on-demand used projects loading (used projects are kept not loaded to save resources and are only loaded when necessary). The purpose of this is to improve performance when working with large projects, having multiple used projects. Also if unloaded used projects have indexes, their contents are visible and they can be used without ever loading them. It also allows working on part of the large project without having all the used projects files (perhaps you took part of the project for home work).

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;This sample is derived from the Magic Library sample, with the different emphasis. Magic Library sample demonstrates modeling techniques and this sample concentrates on model decomposition techniques.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&amp;#160;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
All the used project settings, demonstrated in this sample, can be seen in the &lt;b&gt;Used Project Options&lt;/b&gt; dialog (&lt;b&gt;Options-&amp;gt;Project Usages&lt;/b&gt; command from main menu). There is a viewlet, explaining this sample at &lt;a href=&quot;http://www.nomagic.com/files/viewlets/MD_viewlets_Model_Decomposition.html?ml=1&quot;&gt;No Magic site&lt;/a&gt;.      
&lt;br&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;The diagram below illustrates recommended methodology of model decomposition. Diagram answers the question &lt;b&gt;&amp;quot;How should I partition and configure projects?&amp;quot;&lt;/b&gt;.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_11_5EAPbeta_f720368_1150986941115_548513_29'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_11_5EAPbeta_f720368_1149579200508_298230_119'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>STEREOTYPE_FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>STEREOTYPE_FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>SansSerif</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='11'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>63, 413, 174, 50</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.0'/>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736152_194726_60</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_11_5_f720368_1151914648662_836620_318'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_11_5_f720368_1151912123037_394603_896'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>STEREOTYPE_FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>STEREOTYPE_FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>SansSerif</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='11'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>91, 658, 127, 50</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.0'/>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736152_194726_60</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='DiagramShape' xmi:id='_11_5_f720368_1151914716912_972557_330'>
		<elementID xmi:idref='_11_5EAPbeta_f720368_1151064310769_481194_1'/>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>STEREOTYPE_FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>STEREOTYPE_FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>SansSerif</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='11'/>
				<style xmi:value='0'/>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>49, 546, 230, 50</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<diagramOverviewScale xmi:value='1.0'/>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736152_194726_60</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_11_5_8740266_1151933197656_895740_1'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='FontProperty'>
				<propertyID>FONT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>FONT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<fontName>Arial</fontName>
				<size xmi:value='20'/>
				<style xmi:value='1'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 35, 567, 40</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>MagicDraw Project Decomposition </text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_15_5_8760274_1212997738312_301348_372'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 483, 674, 30</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
Next diagram explains what dependencies between model elements shall be avoided when partitioning model into used projects and later on, when editing read-write used projects.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_15_5_8760274_1212997853031_718301_378'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>35, 623, 621, 30</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
The last diagram explains what are recovered elements, what causes them and how to handle described situations:

    &lt;/p&gt;

  &lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;
</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<mdElement elementClass='TextBox' xmi:id='_15_5_8760274_1212997928328_154560_384'>
		<properties>
			<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
				<propertyID>HTML_TEXT</propertyID>
				<propertyDescriptionID>HTML_TEXT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				<value xmi:value='true'/>
			</mdElement>
		</properties>
		<geometry>28, 721, 674, 150</geometry>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
Other diagrams in this sample are imported from the Magic Library sample and are not essential.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
      
&lt;br&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
&lt;b&gt;Notes:       
&lt;/b&gt;&lt;br&gt;

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
It is important to understand the difference between used project and profile. The profiles are often stored in separate projects and often reused in other project. However not every used project stores a profile. Any model part can be exported into separate project.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
		<symbolStyleID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_726533_8</symbolStyleID>
	</mdElement>
	<symbolStyles>
		<mdElement elementClass='SimpleStyle'>
			<name>Default</name>
			<default xmi:value='false'/>
			<mdElement elementClass='ExtendableManager'>
				<removable xmi:value='false'/>
				<extendableByDiagram xmi:value='true'/>
				<extendableByStereotype xmi:value='false'/>
				<name>Diagram Shape</name>
				<propertyManagerID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736152_194726_60</propertyManagerID>
				<parentPropertyManager>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_119185_2</parentPropertyManager>
				<mdElement elementClass='ColorProperty'>
					<propertyID>FILL_COLOR</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>FILL_COLOR_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
					<value xmi:value='-1'/>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='ChoiceProperty'>
					<propertyID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>STEREOTYPES_DISPLAY_MODE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
					<value>STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE</value>
					<choice xmi:value='STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT_AND_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_ICON^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE_AND_TEXT^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_SHAPE_IMAGE^STEREOTYPE_DISPLAY_MODE_DO_NOT_DISPLAY_STEREOTYPES'/>
					<index xmi:value='4'/>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_TAGGED_VALUES</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_TAGGED_VALUES_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='ChoiceProperty'>
					<propertyID>USE_STEREOTYPE</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>USE_STEREOTYPE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
					<value>USE_STEREOTYPE_DIAGRAM</value>
					<choice xmi:value='USE_STEREOTYPE_CONTEXT^USE_STEREOTYPE_DIAGRAM'/>
					<index xmi:value='1'/>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_ABBREVIATED_TYPE</propertyID>

				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_NAME</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_NAME_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_PARAMETERS</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_PARAMETERS_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_CONTEXT_NAME</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_CONTEXT_NAME_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_CONTEXT_TYPE</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_CONTEXT_TYPE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_TYPE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
					<value xmi:value='true'/>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_FRAME_OWNER</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_FRAME_OWNER_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>AUTOSCALE_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>AUTOSCALE_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
					<value xmi:value='true'/>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>SHOW_MORE_SIGN_FOR_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_MORE_SIGN_FOR_DIAGRAM_OVERVIEW_CONTENT_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>

					<propertyDescriptionID>SHOW_DIAGRAM_HEADER_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
					<value xmi:value='true'/>
				</mdElement>
			</mdElement>
			<mdElement elementClass='ExtendableManager'>
				<removable xmi:value='false'/>
				<extendableByDiagram xmi:value='false'/>
				<extendableByStereotype xmi:value='false'/>
				<name>Shapes</name>
				<propertyManagerID>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_119185_2</propertyManagerID>
				<parentPropertyManager>_18_5_10ba0377_1484680736149_62848_1</parentPropertyManager>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>AUTOSIZE</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>AUTOSIZE_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='BooleanProperty'>
					<propertyID>USE_FIXED_CONNECTION_POINTS</propertyID>
					<propertyDescriptionID>USE_FIXED_CONNECTION_POINTS_DESCRIPTION</propertyDescriptionID>
				</mdElement>
				<mdElement elementClass='ChoiceProperty'>
					<propertyID>SUSPEND_SHAPE_AUTO_RESIZE</propertyID>
````

````text
		<geometry>35, 378, 560, 245</geometry>
		<compartment compartmentID='TAGGED_VALUES2'/>
		<mdOwnedViews/>
		<text>&lt;html&gt;
  &lt;head&gt;
		&lt;style&gt;
			p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}
		&lt;/style&gt;
	&lt;/head&gt;
  &lt;body&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
This was the class, which was previously (during the last save) accessible in the used project [domain.mdzip]. Now (during opening of the project) the class is not accessible in the project.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
Reasons why the element became not accessible in the project might be:

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;ul&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
The element was removed from that used project;

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
The element was moved to another project, which is not used in the main project

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
The element was moved to a not-shared place of the same project

      &lt;/li&gt;
      &lt;li&gt;
Users stopped sharing elements of the project, which caused this element to become not accessible.

      &lt;/li&gt;
    &lt;/ul&gt;
    &lt;p&gt;
In this sample case, the class was removed, and two separate classes were introduced - ArrayList and LinkedList.

    &lt;/p&gt;

    &lt;p&gt;
As a subsequence, the old class &amp;quot;List&amp;quot; is displayed as &amp;quot;Recovered Element&amp;quot; (There is a R character adornment at the top left), because the main project still maintain references to this element, and allows to solve all invalid references even the target element became not accessible.

    &lt;/p&gt;

&lt;/body&gt;
&lt;/html&gt;</text>
````
